name: codex-profile-manager
description: macOS desktop utility for managing isolated Codex App profiles.

scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer
scripts.dev: npm run build:main && concurrently -k "tsc -p tsconfig.main.json --watch" "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
